creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
astyle in Discord commented on the footer at <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=top&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-CURRENT>. 

Also at <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=top&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD+12.0-RELEASE> for example, for 12.0: 

> FreeBSD	13.0

I imagine a logical explanation. If it’s easy to express, then maybe express it at <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi/help.html>. Thanks
